title: Arlong Defends His Control
description: On pages 9–12, arlong defends his control focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.
scene: On pages 9–12, arlong defends his control focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You went too damn far, you rubber- trash!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I ain't got a damn clue...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: about Fishmen or how great they are...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Nor do I know anything about maps or her circuit- stances... BUT!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I finally know how to help her now...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: This room that she never wanted to be in... I can't allow it to exist!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'll erase this place down to the very last trace!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: don't get conceited now...! As if the mighty arlong park,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Could ever be destroyed by the likes of you inferior scum!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
